data_description.interface: Select the network interface to use for ECHONET Lite communication. Select Auto to let Home Assistant automatically detect the appropriate interface.

user.description: Home Assistant automatically binds to the ECHONET Lite multicast channel (224.0.23.0:3610) and begins listening for devices.
user.title: Set up ECHONET Lite

runtime_client_error.description: The ECHONET Lite integration encountered an error: {error}. This may be caused by network issues or device disconnection. Check your network configuration and ensure your ECHONET Lite devices are powered on.
runtime_client_error.title: ECHONET Lite runtime error

runtime_inactive.description: No frames have been received from ECHONET Lite devices for more than {minutes} minutes. This may indicate that devices are offline or there is a network issue. Check that your ECHONET Lite devices are powered on and connected to the network.
runtime_inactive.title: ECHONET Lite devices not responding

data_description.enable_experimental: When enabled, device classes that have not been verified with real hardware will also be registered. These may not work correctly.
